items.title: New standing data source — Add a standing ops feed for inbox recovery outcomes
items.body: The build added inbox_recovery telemetry in the thread_events table with queryable recovery outcomes and stale-thread detection signals.

items.title: New loop process — Add a post-deploy recovery telemetry review checkpoint
items.body: The build adds recovery automation and telemetry but no standing review step to confirm recovery fires and clears stuck threads in production.

items.title: AI-to-mechanistic — Schedule Gmail In-Progress reconciliation outside the agent loop
items.body: The plan keeps Gmail-side In-Progress label recovery in the existing MCP gmail_reconcile_in_progress workflow invoked during periodic agent operation; a cron-triggered mechanistic alternative would remove the dependency on agent availability.
